productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Black Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather slippers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair of slippers and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide midfoot leather strap with stitch detailing to hold the foot in placeLeather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleBoat shaped outsole to enable natural movement of the footTPU outsole with modified herringbone pattern grooves on the forefoot and heel to offer absolute grip on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
